title: LLM Conversation Output Schema
description: Schema describing an LLM output that contains an ordered list of iterations (each with answer, review, critique, and plan_to_improve) and a final_answer object.

iterations.description: An ordered array where each item represents one iterative output from the model (drafts/improvements).

answer.description: The model's answer for this iteration.

review.description: A short review of the iteration's answer (what is good or correct).

critique.description: A short critique identifying faults, omissions, or risks in the answer.

plan_to_improve.description: A concise plan or next steps the model proposes to improve the answer in a subsequent iteration.

final.description: Indicates if this iteration is considered the final answer by the model.

final_answer.description: The final consolidated answer after iterative improvement, plus metadata.

summary.description: A brief summary of the final answer.

notes.description: Optional implementation notes, caveats, or performance considerations.
